emails.body:
Google Cloud Public Sector Update — October 2026

New AI agent capabilities for government workloads
--------------------------------------------------
Vertex AI Agent Builder now supports FedRAMP High authorization paths, enabling agencies to deploy conversational agents with controlled data boundaries. Early adopters report 40% reduction in help-desk ticket volume for routine inquiries.

Security controls enhancements
------------------------------
• Assured Workloads: New CJIS and IL5 templates automate compliance posture for law enforcement and DoD tenants.
• Key Access Justifications: Now generally available for Cloud KMS and Cloud HSM, providing approver-based key access with full audit trails.
• VPC Service Controls: Expanded support for Vertex AI, BigQuery Omni, and Apigee to reduce data exfiltration risk.

Customer spotlight
------------------
A state-level health agency migrated 12 legacy databases to AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, cutting query latency by 60% while maintaining HIPAA alignment through Assured Workloads.

Upcoming events
---------------
• GovCloud Summit (virtual) — Oct 15–16
• Secure AI/ML Workshop Series — weekly starting Oct 22

Manage preferences or unsubscribe: https://cloud.google.com/public-sector/preferences

— The Google Cloud Public Sector Team

Reminder: Secure Analytics for Mission Teams Webinar

Date: October 10, 2026 | 1300–1400 ET

Join Google Cloud engineers and public sector customers for a live demonstration of:

• BigQuery data clean rooms for multi-agency analysis without raw data sharing
• Confidential Computing on C3 instances for encrypted-in-use analytics
• Looker governance dashboards mapped to NIST 800-53 Rev. 5 controls

Speakers:
- Maria Chen, Principal Solutions Architect, Federal Civilian
- Capt. Robert Hall (ret.), Former J6, now Strategic Accounts Lead

Register here: https://events.googlecloud.example/secure-analytics-oct2026

Can't attend? A recording will be available on demand within 48 hours.

Questions? Reply to this email or contact federal-support@googlecloud.example

— Google Cloud Public Sector Events Team
